name: nginwho
author: pouriya jamshidi
description: nginwho is a lightweight and extremely fast nginx log parser, Cloudflare origin IP resolver and non-Cloudflare CIDRs blocker

releases.d: nginwho is a lightweight and extremely fast nginx log parser that stores the result into a sqlite3 database for further analysis and actions
